name: @streetjs/cli
description: Street Framework CLI — scaffold, generate, migrate, and run TypeScript backend projects.

scripts.test: node --test dist/tests/argv.test.js dist/tests/create.test.js dist/tests/create-templates.test.js dist/tests/create-frontend.test.js dist/tests/create-database.test.js dist/tests/add.test.js dist/tests/generate.test.js dist/tests/migrate.test.js dist/tests/upgrade.test.js && node --test --test-force-exit dist/tests/create-boot.integration.test.js dist/tests/index.test.js dist/tests/dev.test.js dist/tests/info.test.js dist/tests/registry.test.js dist/tests/verify.test.js
scripts.coverage: c8 node --test dist/tests/argv.test.js dist/tests/create.test.js dist/tests/create-templates.test.js dist/tests/create-frontend.test.js dist/tests/create-database.test.js dist/tests/generate.test.js dist/tests/migrate.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run verify:pack

author: street contributors
